nasb.text: and for the Gentiles to glorify God for His mercy; as it is written, “Therefore I will give praise to You among the Gentiles, And I will sing to Your name.”

esv.text: and in order that the Gentiles might glorify God for his mercy. As it is written, “Therefore I will praise you among the Gentiles, and sing to your name.”

cnv.text: 使外族人因著所蒙的憐憫榮耀　神；如經上所記： “因此我要在列邦中稱讚你， 歌頌你的名。”

ccb.text: 使外族人也因祂的怜悯而将荣耀归给上帝。正如圣经上说： “因此，我要在列邦中赞美你， 歌颂你的名。”

csbs.text: 并且使外邦人因着所蒙的怜悯而荣耀神，正如经上所记： “为此，我要在外邦人中承认你， 歌颂你的名。”
